Focus Week Case Study: Bringing E2E Tests into the CI Pipeline - Tobi(as Mende)
Azure-Devops Pipeline - wait for E2E tests pipeline to pass before deploy to next environment - Stack Overflow

content.text:
End-to-End (E2E) pipelines are integral to modern software development, ensuring that applications function seamlessly from start to finish. Below are several authoritative and recent sources that delve into various aspects of E2E pipelines:

1. **"E2E DevOps Pipeline with GitLab" by IBM Mediacenter**  
   This resource provides a comprehensive demonstration of implementing an E2E DevOps pipeline using GitLab, highlighting integration across various phases of the application lifecycle. ([mediacenter.ibm.com](https://mediacenter.ibm.com/media/E2E%2BDevOps%2BPipeline%2Bwith%2BGitLab/1_gds3ux8t?utm_source=openai))

2. **"Feature-Driven End-To-End Test Generation" by Alian et al.**  
   This academic paper introduces AutoE2E, a novel approach leveraging Large Language Models to automate the generation of semantically meaningful feature-driven E2E test cases for web applications. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01894?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Focus Week Case Study: Bringing E2E Tests into the CI Pipeline" by Tobi(as Mende)**  
   This case study discusses the integration of E2E tests into the Continuous Integration pipeline, emphasizing the transition from manual to automated testing within the development process. ([mende.io](https://mende.io/blog/focus-week-case-study/?utm_source=openai))

4. **"CI/CD Pipeline" in Microsoft Accessibility Insights Web**  
   This document outlines the Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment infrastructure for the Accessibility Insights Web project, detailing the CI/CD system's role in building, testing, and deploying the browser extension and NPM packages. ([deepwiki.com](https://deepwiki.com/microsoft/accessibility-insights-web/3.3-cicd-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Azure-DevOps Pipeline - Wait for E2E Tests Pipeline to Pass Before Deploy to Next Environment" on Stack Overflow**  
   This discussion addresses strategies for configuring Azure DevOps pipelines to ensure that E2E tests pass before deploying to subsequent environments, providing practical insights into pipeline management. ([stackoverflow.com](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/66504749/azure-devops-pipeline-wait-for-e2e-tests-pipeline-to-pass-before-deploy-to-nex?utm_source=openai))

6. **"Reliable E2E Test Report (#443270)" on GitLab**  
   This GitLab issue report presents data on the reliability of E2E tests, offering insights into test performance and areas for improvement within the pipeline. ([gitlab.com](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/issues/443270?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Reliable E2E Test Report (#457423)" on GitLab**  
   Another GitLab issue report detailing the reliability of E2E tests, highlighting specific tests with failures and their respective failure rates. ([gitlab.com](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/issues/457423?utm_source=openai))

8. **"2024 and E2E" on Supply Chain Brief**  
   This article discusses the importance of supply chain visibility software in 2024, emphasizing the role of E2E visibility in enhancing decision-making and customer satisfaction. ([supplychainbrief.com](https://www.supplychainbrief.com/2024/e2e/?utm_source=openai))

9. **"2024 and E2E" on Purchasing & Procurement Zone**  
   This piece explores how enterprise solutions are driving efficiency and ROI in procurement, focusing on the unification of the Source-to-Pay lifecycle for better spend visibility and compliance. ([purchasingprocurementzone.com](https://www.purchasingprocurementzone.com/2024/e2e/?utm_source=openai))

10. **"Why You Should Build Your AI Application on E2E Cloud" by E2E Networks**  
    This blog post discusses the advantages of building AI applications on E2E Cloud, highlighting its performance and scalability as an Infrastructure as a Service provider. ([e2enetworks.com](https://www.e2enetworks.com/blog/why-you-should-build-your-ai-application-on-e2e-cloud?utm_source=openai))

These sources offer a diverse range of perspectives on E2E pipelines, from technical implementations and case studies to discussions on reliability and industry trends.

These sources offer a diverse range of perspectives on E2E pipelines, from technical implementations and case studies to discussions on reliability and industry trends.
